query: SELECT id, customer_name, customer_email, status, booking_date, product_id, product_name, created_at FROM reservations WHERE customer_name LIKE '%Simo%' OR customer_name LIKE '%Blanquez%' OR customer_email LIKE '%severalenergy%' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rp6zCMfN7Vv5FK.root --database AV298FS8t5SaTurBBRqhgQ --execute SELECT id, customer_name, customer_email, status, booking_date, product_id, product_name, created_at FROM reservations WHERE customer_name LIKE '%Simo%' OR customer_name LIKE '%Blanquez%' OR customer_email LIKE '%severalenergy%' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;

rows.product_name: Entrada General Piscina Club Nautico (+3 más)
